title: TITLE 13 BEES AND LIVESTOCK - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH COUNTY VECTOR CONTROL AND CODE ENFORCEMENT TITLE 13 BEES AND LIVESTOCK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about city requirements for keeping honeybees and livestock in an urban environment. Livestock animals include but are not limited to: chickens, turkeys, pigs, rabbits, goats, horses, and cattle. 5235 N Columbia Boulevard Portland, OR 97203 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-3:30pm Email (503) 988-7700 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 988-7700 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Fill out an online form to report a concern. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Portland Services: Animal Control Beekeeping Permits Special Animal Permits Other Services Offered At This Location: PUBLIC HEALTH - BED BUG INFORMATION LINE PUBLIC HEALTH - RODENT AND MOSQUITO CONTROL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
